hero.title: Turn event descriptions into
hero.subtitle: Describe your event, and CueQuote generates a complete equipment list with accurate pricing — ready to send as a branded PDF.

useCases.title: Built for AV professionals
useCases.subtitle: Whether you run a rental house, freelance, or manage an agency — CueQuote fits your workflow.
useCases.avProductionDesc: Generate accurate proposals from your equipment catalog. Send branded PDFs that match your company identity.
useCases.freelanceDesc: Quote faster than your competitors. Go from WhatsApp inquiry to professional proposal in 2 minutes.
useCases.agencyDesc: Scope AV requirements for client events without deep technical knowledge. AI handles the equipment selection.

features.title: Everything you need to quote faster
features.subtitle: From AI generation to PDF export — all in one platform.
features.aiDesc: Describe your event in plain language. AI generates a complete, scoped equipment list with quantities and pricing.
features.pdfDesc: One-click PDF with your logo, colors, and layout. Professional proposals your clients will trust.
features.shareDesc: Send a link. Track views. Know when they open it. Get notified when they accept or decline.
features.catalogDesc: Manage your inventory with default pricing. AI pulls from your catalog for accurate, consistent quoting.
features.currencyDesc: Quote in EUR, USD, GBP, CHF, PLN, AED, or EGP. Set per-company defaults or override per-proposal.
features.analyticsDesc: Dashboard with pipeline value, win rate, and proposal analytics. Know what's working.

howItWorks.title: Three steps. Two minutes.
howItWorks.subtitle: From event brief to sent proposal.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Type or paste your event brief. Include venue, attendees, AV needs — as much or as little as you want.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI generates a complete equipment list. Edit quantities, prices, add or remove items. Everything is editable.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Export a branded PDF or share a link. Track when your client views it. Get notified when they respond.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade as you grow.
pricing.businessDesc: For teams that quote at scale.
pricing.heroSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more. No contracts, no surprises.
pricing.enterpriseDesc: Custom pricing for large teams with advanced security and dedicated support.
pricing.creditPacksSubtitle: Need a few proposals without a subscription? Buy credits, use anytime.
pricing.readySubtitle: Join AV professionals who create proposals in minutes, not hours.
pricing.faqQ1: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing.faqA1: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.
pricing.faqQ2: Is there a contract or commitment?
pricing.faqA2: No. All plans are month-to-month with no long-term commitment. Cancel anytime.
pricing.faqQ3: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faqA3: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) through Stripe. For Enterprise plans, we also support invoicing.
pricing.faqA4: Yes. Annual plans save 20%. The discount is applied automatically when you choose annual billing in the app.
pricing.faqQ5: What happens when I hit my proposal limit?
pricing.faqA5: You can upgrade your plan or purchase credit packs starting at €19 for 3 proposals.
pricing.faqA6: Yes. Starter, Pro, and Business plans come with a 3-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
pricing.faqA7: Credit packs let you buy proposals without a monthly subscription. Buy a 3-pack for €19 or a 10-pack for €49. Credits never expire and include branded PDFs.

homeFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
homeFaq.q1: How does the AI generate proposals?
homeFaq.a1: You describe your event in plain language — type of event, venue, attendee count, AV needs. CueQuote's AI analyzes the requirements and generates a complete equipment list with quantities and pricing based on your catalog.
homeFaq.q2: Can I customize the generated proposals?
homeFaq.a2: Absolutely. Everything is editable — add, remove, or modify line items, adjust quantities and prices, set discounts and VAT. The AI gives you a starting point; you have full control.
homeFaq.q3: What equipment categories does CueQuote cover?
homeFaq.a3: Audio, video, lighting, simultaneous interpretation, streaming, digital signage, staging, labor, and transport. We seed your catalog with 30 common AV items, and you can add your own.
homeFaq.a4: Yes. We use Supabase with row-level security. Your equipment catalog, pricing, and client data are isolated to your company. No other user can access your data.
homeFaq.q5: Can I use my own branding?
homeFaq.a5: Yes. Upload your logo, set your brand colors, and all PDFs and share pages will use your branding. Your clients see your company, not CueQuote.
homeFaq.q6: Do you offer a free plan?
homeFaq.a6: Yes. The free plan includes 3 proposals per month with basic PDF export and share links. No credit card required.
homeFaq.a7: Yes. Starter, Pro, and Business plans come with a 3-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
homeFaq.q8: What happens when I hit my proposal limit?
homeFaq.a8: You can upgrade your plan or purchase credit packs starting at €19 for 3 proposals. Credits never expire.

about.title: About CueQuote
about.subtitle: Built by AV professionals, for AV professionals.
about.heading: Built by AV professionals,
about.p1: CueQuote was born from a simple frustration: quoting AV equipment for live events takes too long.
about.p2: We're AVE Events — a production company based in Europe that has managed conferences, corporate events, and live shows across the continent and the Middle East. We know what it's like to receive a brief at 10 PM and need a proposal by morning.
about.p3: Spreadsheets, copy-paste from old proposals, manual calculations — we did it all. And we watched other companies do the same. Hours of work for every quote. Errors in pricing. Inconsistent formatting. Proposals that didn't reflect the quality of our production work.
about.p4: So we built CueQuote: an AI-powered tool that turns event descriptions into complete, professional AV proposals. The same quality output in 2 minutes instead of 2 hours.
about.diff1: We've scoped hundreds of real AV proposals — the AI knows what a 300-person conference actually needs
about.diff2: Built by the same team behind CueDeck, the live event production console
about.diff3: We understand the AV rental workflow, not just generic quoting
about.diff4: European-first: multi-currency, VAT support, GDPR compliant
about.p5: CueQuote is part of the CueDeck ecosystem — tools purpose-built for the live event production industry. We're not a generic proposal tool with an AV skin. We built this from the ground up for our industry.
